Metadata.title: ShareYourLink
Metadata.description: Share your links with a simple code and let others access them easily. No more long URLs, just a short code to share your links with anyone, anywhere.

Landing.title: Welcome to ShareYourLink
Landing.description: ShareYourLink is a simple and efficient link management tool that allows you to share links with ease. Whether you want to share your social media profiles, portfolio, presentations, or any other important links, ShareYourLink has got you covered. Start sharing!

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: ShareYourLink is a simple and efficient link management tool that allows you to share links with ease. Whether you want to share your social media profiles, portfolio, presentations, or any other important links, ShareYourLink has got you covered. Start sharing!
HowItWorks.section1Description1Description: Paste your link, you will get a
HowItWorks.section1Description1Description2: that you can share with others. Easy and fast, is that simple, just a 4 digits code.
HowItWorks.section1Description2Description: Paste the code you got and you will get the
HowItWorks.section1Description2Description2: instantly. No more long URLs, just a short code to access your links with anyone, anywhere.
HowItWorks.section2Description1: Just paste your link, get the code, share it and retrieve it whenever you want. No registration, just a simple and free service to share your links with others. Developed with the idea of creating a platfor where you can send and receive links without sending emails or logging in.
HowItWorks.section2Description2: Eg. You want to send your presentation link to the class pc and you don't want to send an email either because there is not an email client available or you don't have access to one.
HowItWorks.section2Description3: No bullshit, no ads, no tracking. Just a simple and free service to share your links with others. You can even check our open source code on
HowItWorks.section2Description4: * As an antiabuse measure, we save the IP address of requests for a maximum of 5 minutes to prevent bots, spam, and DDoS-like request bursts. This data is automatically deleted after the time limit and is not used for any other purpose.

Cookies.title: Cookie Policy
Cookies.subtitle: Open source, simple, and privacy-first. ShareYourLink keeps things intentionally minimal. We do not run ads, we do not build user profiles, and we do not use invasive trackers. We only use what is needed for the app to work properly.
Cookies.what_is_text: A cookie is a small file your browser stores so a site can remember basic settings. On ShareYourLink, this is limited to technical behavior such as language preference.
Cookies.types_intro: We only use essential functionality, privacy-friendly analytics, and temporary server-side abuse protection.
Cookies.c_tech_desc: Stores your locale preference (for example, NEXT_LOCALE) so the interface loads in your selected language.
Cookies.c_umami_desc: Measures aggregate traffic (page views, referrers, popular pages) without building personal profiles.
Cookies.c_security_desc: Temporarily stores IP address data for up to 5 minutes to limit bots, spam, and DDoS-like request bursts.
Cookies.analytics_text: We use Umami to understand overall traffic and improve ShareYourLink. We do not track users across websites and we do not create individual behavioral profiles.
Cookies.manage_text: You can block or delete cookies from your browser settings at any time. If you do, basic features like language preference may stop working as expected:

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.description: ShareYourLink is a simple open source project.
ContactPage.body: If you have any questions or doubts, contact us at

CreatePage.title: Create Link
CreatePage.description: Paste any URL and get a 4-digit code you can share. The code stays active for 5 minutes.

GetPage.title: Get Link
GetPage.description: Enter the 4-digit code you received to retrieve the original link. The code must be used within 5 minutes of creation.
GetPage.disclaimer: * Clicking the retrieved link will open it in the tab while clicking the link icon will open it in a new tab. We do not track clicks or user behavior, but please be cautious when sharing links and only share with trusted parties.

IdeasPage.title: Ideas
IdeasPage.description: ShareYourLink is a simple open source project built for the community.
IdeasPage.body: If you have any questions, contact us at
IdeasPage.contribute: If you want to contribute an idea or improvement, open a PR on
